title: Dispatch! Muteking
overview: Rin Yuki meets Takoro, who helps him transform into the superhero Muteking to battle the Kurodako Brothers.

title: The Mysterious Strap Huge Mess
overview: Muteking deals with chaos caused by a mysterious strap-based alien technology​.

title: Eat Again Before and After Meals
overview: The Kurodako Brothers create robotic chairs that force-feed people until they are too full to move. Muteking steps in to stop this strange, food-related alien scheme.

title: Conquer with Disinformation!
overview: The Kurodako Brothers attempt to conquer Earth through spreading disinformation, and Muteking has to counter their misinformation​.

title: Large Waves and Small Waves Flood!
overview: The Kurodako Brothers cause a great flood by manipulating waves, and Muteking must find a way to stop the disaster.

title: Weird Personal Consultation
overview: Muteking finds himself dealing with strange personal consultations brought on by the Kurodako Brothers’ newest plan​.

title: Bullshit Baseball! 0 to 0
overview: The Kurodako Brothers disrupt a baseball game with their antics, leading to an unusual match where Muteking must intervene​.

title: It's a Big Jungle Panic!
overview: The jungle is in chaos, and Muteking has to handle the mess caused by alien interference.

title: Play Play Play with Everyone!
overview: Muteking leads a playful adventure where everyone is involved in a big game orchestrated by the Kurodako Brothers.

title: Is the Octopus the Great Demon King of the Universe?
overview: Muteking confronts a new threat in the form of an octopus that is revealed to be a powerful force from space.

title: Surprise! The Earth is Full of Robots
overview: Muteking encounters an invasion of robots sent by the Kurodako Brothers, adding a mechanical twist to their usual alien plots.

title: It Came Out! The Great Phantom of the Kurodako Mansion
overview: A ghostly figure appears in the Kurodako Mansion, and Muteking must investigate and stop any paranormal threats the Kurodako Brothers may be using.

title: Everyone Dig Here! A Treasure Sleeps
overview: The Kurodako Brothers embark on a treasure hunt, and Muteking tries to prevent them from uncovering dangerous items or power sources.

title: New Hero? Female Muteking
overview: A new hero enters the scene—a female version of Muteking, adding a twist to the familiar storyline and challenging the Kurodako Brothers in unexpected ways.

title: Everyone Hibernate with Flowing Snow
overview: In a winter-themed episode, the Kurodako Brothers try to freeze the city, forcing Muteking to intervene amid snowy chaos.

title: New Theory! Human Evaporation If Wet in the Rain
overview: The Kurodako Brothers’ latest scheme claims humans will evaporate in rain, a strange and unique plot Muteking must expose.

title: What Happens to Humans If They Enjoy Themselves in a Car?
overview: This comedic episode explores the Kurodako Brothers' latest gimmick, involving people enjoying themselves in cars with unexpected results.

title: Festival Heave-ho! Everyone Dance
overview: In a celebratory setting, Muteking takes on the Kurodako Brothers during a festival, where dancing becomes key to thwarting their plans.

title: Kurodako's Perfect Helmet
overview: The Kurodako Brothers develop a helmet they claim is perfect for mind control, and Muteking must stop them from controlling people’s minds.

title: Popular Climax! Kurodako Sound
overview: Music returns as a theme with the Kurodako Brothers unleashing their new soundwave technology, which Muteking must counter.

title: Lots of Laughs! Kurodako Large Circus
overview: The Kurodako Brothers set up a circus to draw crowds, where they plan to trap and brainwash attendees. Muteking must disrupt their act and save the audience.

title: Maze! All Adults and Children are Lost
overview: In this episode, the Kurodako Brothers create a vast, confusing maze, trapping people inside. Muteking takes on the challenge of navigating it to rescue the captives.

title: Octopus Star Stone That Opens Good Luck
overview: The Kurodako Brothers claim to have a lucky stone that grants immense power. Muteking intervenes before they can use it to control people’s minds.

title: Takoro's Guts Marathon Man
overview: Takoro, Muteking’s alien friend, joins a marathon race where the Kurodako Brothers use dirty tricks to sabotage the competition, but Muteking steps in to ensure a fair race.

title: Winds and Clouds! Great Duel on Mount Eagle
overview: In a mountainous region, Muteking confronts the Kurodako Brothers in a high-stakes showdown, testing his abilities against their latest strategies.

title: It's a Break, Hot Saucer
overview: The Kurodako Brothers create a “Hot Saucer” attraction that hypnotizes people. Muteking must find a way to break the spell and stop their sinister scheme.

title: Realization! Kurodako's Utopia
overview: The Kurodako Brothers try to establish their version of a utopia on Earth. Muteking works to reveal their true intentions and dismantle their plans.

title: Welcome! Kurodako's Ryugu Castle
overview: In an underwater adventure, Muteking discovers the Kurodako Brothers’ “Ryugu Castle,” where they plan to unleash a flood. He must stop them to prevent widespread destruction.

title: Success! Kurodako's Conquest of the Moon
overview: The Kurodako Brothers aim to extend their reach to the moon, planning a lunar conquest that Muteking must thwart in a cosmic battle.

title: Goodbye Mitchie
overview: This episode takes a more heartfelt turn as Muteking faces a personal challenge involving his friend Mitchie, bringing a touch of emotion to the series.

title: Ah Sad Love! Takomi's Pure Love
overview: Takomi, a character with a heartfelt storyline, experiences a story of unrequited love, adding a more emotional element to the series.

title: Unable to Recover?! Kurodako's Complete Defeat
overview: The Kurodako Brothers face an unexpected failure in their latest scheme, which leads to a humorous exploration of their reactions to defeat.

title: Let's Go to Japan! Great Migration
overview: In a Japan-focused episode, Muteking and his friends embark on a journey, facing cultural clashes and new challenges brought by the Kurodako Brothers.

title: Silver Family Big Race
overview: The Kurodako Brothers set up a big race event, where they attempt to interfere with the competition, prompting Muteking to jump into the race to save the day.

title: Life or Death?! KO Ranch Death Fight
overview: Set on a ranch, Muteking must confront the Kurodako Brothers in a dangerous showdown involving a series of physical challenges.

title: Thrill! Horror Truck Bastard
overview: This episode introduces a villain who uses a haunted truck to terrorize the streets. Muteking faces a high-speed, horror-themed challenge to stop him.

title: Open Dignifiedly! Takoro Police
overview: Takoro, Muteking's alien friend, takes on a pseudo-police role in a comedic fashion, attempting to uphold justice amid the Kurodako Brothers’ antics.

title: No No No! Takoro's Mom
overview: Takoro’s mother makes an appearance, bringing family dynamics into play as Takoro faces both familial expectations and the ongoing alien threats.

title: Large Profit?! Kurodako Tour Boat
overview: The Kurodako Brothers organize a boat tour with the intention of scamming tourists, and Muteking intervenes to prevent their fraudulent scheme.

title: Fighting Portable Shrine Great Melee
overview: During a local festival involving portable shrines, Muteking finds himself in the middle of a chaotic melee, battling against the Kurodako Brothers in a unique setting.

title: Fly Fly Balloon! Big Race
overview: The episode features a hot-air balloon race orchestrated by the Kurodako Brothers. Muteking joins in to prevent their scheme from taking a chaotic turn.

title: Great Hit? Takoro Picture Story Show
overview: Takoro decides to entertain the public with a storytelling performance, but the Kurodako Brothers have plans to turn it into a mess, and Muteking has to step in to keep order.

title: Bloom In the Sky! Humanity Fireworks
overview: In a festival of fireworks, the Kurodako Brothers attempt to control the display to create chaos in the city. Muteking must stop them before the fireworks endanger the spectators.

title: Great Sale! Kurodako Mansion
overview: The Kurodako Brothers hold a "great sale" event at their mansion, luring in customers with sinister intentions. Muteking investigates to uncover their plan.

title: Tears! Retirement of Downtown Train
overview: A beloved train is set to retire, but the Kurodako Brothers plot to exploit the event. Muteking gets involved to prevent them from ruining the occasion.

title: Brilliant! Kurodako's Summer Vacation
overview: In a beach-themed episode, the Kurodako Brothers disrupt a summer vacation spot, and Muteking must restore peace to keep everyone safe.

title: Angler Takoro
overview: Takoro goes on a fishing trip that the Kurodako Brothers plan to sabotage. Muteking joins in to ensure Takoro’s safety and to foil their plans.

title: The Panda Has Disappeared! Invisibility Cloak
overview: A panda goes missing, and the Kurodako Brothers use an invisibility cloak in their latest scheme. Muteking embarks on a search to reveal the panda’s location.

title: Don't Turn Off the Lights In the Playhouse
overview: The Kurodako Brothers target a local theater, attempting to ruin a play by cutting the lights. Muteking intervenes to save the performance.

title: Impressed! Kurodako Tears of Parents
overview: This episode shows a softer side to the Kurodako Brothers, as they explore family themes. Muteking finds himself in an unexpected situation that reveals more about his foes.

title: First Love! Takosak's Pure Story
overview: Takosak experiences his first love, creating a comedic and emotional episode that explores feelings and unexpected challenges in romance.

title: Reconciliation?! Kurodako's SOS
overview: The Kurodako Brothers, known for their villainy, signal for help, revealing a more vulnerable side as they face an unforeseen dilemma that requires Muteking’s intervention.

title: How to Win the Muteking Game
overview: In a game-like scenario, the Kurodako Brothers set up challenges for Muteking. This episode dives into strategy and highlights Muteking's clever tactics against the brothers’ tricky games.

title: Rescue Squad Storm Showdown!
overview: Muteking faces off against a Kurodako-created rescue squad, leading to a series of intense and humorous confrontations as he works to dismantle their latest plans.

title: Great Chase! Telepote Tube
overview: The Kurodako Brothers utilize a teleportation device to evade capture, leading Muteking on a thrilling chase filled with teleportation-induced chaos.

title: This Is the Last Sight! Great Decisive Battle
overview: In this series finale, Muteking engages in a final showdown with the Kurodako Brothers. The stakes are high as the characters confront their biggest conflict, bringing closure to the series with a climactic battle.
